case_title: DARRYL LEWIS VS. JOSEPH A. PENNA et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEWIS, DARRYL AS TO DEFENDANT PENNA, JOSEPH A.
